typography.font-family-heading: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
typography.font-family-body: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
typography.font-family-mono: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace

principles: Accessible by default: every component ships WCAG AA compliant with correct ARIA roles and keyboard support
Composable and themeable: use slot recipes and CSS custom properties for deep customization without overrides
Dark mode support: semantic color tokens automatically adapt via colorMode context
Consistent spacing and sizing: a unified scale of xs/sm/md/lg/xl/2xl applies to all components
Headless primitives: built on Ark UI for behavior; Chakra adds the design layer on top
layout_grids: Grid with templateColumns for custom layouts
design_principles.brand_constraints: Use colorPalette prop (not colorScheme from v2) to apply brand colors; default palette is gray
do: Use colorPalette prop to set a component's color family (e.g. colorPalette='blue')
Wrap app in <Provider> from @chakra-ui/react for theming and color mode support
Use semantic tokens (bg, fg, border) rather than hardcoded color values
Compose compound components using the namespace pattern (e.g. <Card.Root>, <Card.Body>)
dont: Don't use colorScheme (v2 API) — it no longer exists in v3; use colorPalette instead
Don't import from sub-packages — all exports are from @chakra-ui/react in v3
Don't override CSS with !important — extend the theme via defineConfig instead
Don't use Chakra v2 component APIs — v3 is a breaking rewrite with Ark UI underneath

props.name: size
props.description: Button size controlling height, padding and font size

props.name: colorPalette
props.description: Color palette to use from design tokens (e.g. 'blue', 'red', 'green')

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows loading spinner, disables interaction, sets aria-busy

props.name: loadingText
props.description: Text displayed alongside spinner during loading state

props.name: spinner
props.description: Custom spinner element to render during loading

props.name: spinnerPlacement
props.description: Position of spinner relative to loading text

behaviors.result: Fires onClick handler; no-op when disabled or loading
Replaces content with spinner; sets aria-busy=true; prevents click events
Sets aria-disabled, prevents pointer events and keyboard activation

keyboard_map.action: Moves focus to next focusable element

accessibility.focus_management: Receives focus via Tab; visible focus ring rendered via CSS outline with 2px offset
accessibility.wcag_notes: SC 4.1.2 requires accessible name; SC 1.4.11 requires non-text contrast for focus ring; loading state must be announced

examples.title: Solid Button (default)
examples.code:
import { Button } from '@chakra-ui/react'

<Button colorPalette='blue'>Save Changes</Button>

examples.title: Loading Button
examples.code:
import { Button } from '@chakra-ui/react'

<Button loading loadingText='Saving...' colorPalette='blue'>Save</Button>

examples.title: Button Variants
examples.code:

<HStack>
  <Button variant='solid'>Solid</Button>
  <Button variant='outline'>Outline</Button>
  <Button variant='ghost'>Ghost</Button>
  <Button variant='subtle'>Subtle</Button>
</HStack>

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the input border

props.name: invalid
props.description: Marks the input as invalid, applying error styling

props.name: colorPalette
props.description: Color palette for focus ring and active states

behaviors.result: Applies error border color, sets aria-invalid=true
Prevents interaction, reduces opacity, sets aria-disabled
Shows focus ring using colorPalette.focusRing token

keyboard_map.action: Moves focus into/out of the input
Blurs input when supported by parent (e.g. search fields)

accessibility.focus_management: Receives focus via Tab; visible focus ring; error state announced when combined with Field component
accessibility.wcag_notes: SC 1.3.1 and SC 4.1.2 require programmatic label; use Field component to associate label; SC 3.3.1 requires error identification

examples.title: Basic Input with Label
examples.code:

<Field label='Email'>

</Field>

examples.title: Invalid Input
examples.code:

<Field label='Username' invalid errorText='Username is already taken'>
  <Input placeholder='username' invalid />
</Field>

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the card surface

props.name: colorPalette
props.description: Color palette used for card accents

behaviors.result: Applies panel background with box-shadow (md)
Applies panel background with 1px border
Applies muted background color with no border

aria: aria-label (recommended when used as landmark region)
accessibility.focus_management: Not focusable by default; interactive children manage their own focus
accessibility.wcag_notes: If used as a landmark, provide accessible name per SC 1.3.6; SC 1.4.3 applies to text within cards

examples.title: Basic Card
examples.code:

<Card.Root>

    <Card.Title>Card Title</Card.Title>
    <Card.Description>Card description text</Card.Description>
  </Card.Header>
  <Card.Body>Main content here</Card.Body>
  <Card.Footer>
    <Button>Action</Button>
  </Card.Footer>
</Card.Root>

examples.code:

<Card.Root variant='elevated' size='lg'>
  <Card.Body>Elevated content</Card.Body>
</Card.Root>

accessibility.wcag_notes: SC 1.4.1 color must not be the sole means of conveying information; pair badges with text labels

examples.title: Status Badges
examples.code:

<HStack>
  <Badge colorPalette='green'>Active</Badge>
  <Badge colorPalette='red' variant='solid'>Error</Badge>

props.name: status
props.description: Semantic status that sets color palette and default icon

behaviors.result: Sets red colorPalette, displays error icon in indicator slot
Sets green colorPalette, displays check icon in indicator slot
Sets orange colorPalette, displays warning icon in indicator slot
Sets blue colorPalette, displays info icon in indicator slot

accessibility.focus_management: Static; not focusable. Use role=alert for live announcement of dynamic messages
accessibility.wcag_notes: SC 4.1.3: status messages must be programmatically determinable; role=alert is automatically a live region

examples.title: Success Alert
examples.code:
import { Alert } from '@chakra-ui/react'

<Alert.Root status='success'>
  <Alert.Indicator />
  <Alert.Content>
    <Alert.Title>Success!</Alert.Title>
    <Alert.Description>Your changes have been saved.</Alert.Description>
  </Alert.Content>
</Alert.Root>

examples.title: Error Alert with Variant
examples.code:
import { Alert } from '@chakra-ui/react'

<Alert.Root status='error' variant='solid'>
  <Alert.Indicator />
  <Alert.Content>
    <Alert.Title>Error</Alert.Title>
    <Alert.Description>Something went wrong. Please try again.</Alert.Description>
  </Alert.Content>
</Alert.Root>

props.name: modal
props.description: Whether dialog is modal (blocks background interaction)

props.name: closeOnInteractOutside
props.description: Whether clicking outside closes the dialog

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: Whether pressing Escape closes the dialog

props.name: trapFocus
props.description: Whether to trap focus inside the dialog

behaviors.result: Opens dialog, traps focus within content, shows backdrop
Closes dialog when closeOnEscape=true
Closes dialog when closeOnInteractOutside=true
Returns focus to the trigger element that opened the dialog

keyboard_map.action: Cycles focus through focusable elements inside the dialog
Cycles focus backwards through focusable elements

accessibility.focus_management: Focus is trapped inside the dialog when open; returns to trigger element on close; first focusable element receives focus on open
accessibility.wcag_notes: SC 2.1.2 no keyboard trap except for modal dialogs (intentional); SC 2.4.3 focus order must be logical; role=dialog requires accessible name

props.name: placement
props.description: Side from which the drawer slides in

props.description: Width (or height for top/bottom) of the drawer

props.name: closeOnInteractOutside
props.description: Whether clicking outside closes the drawer

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: Whether pressing Escape closes the drawer

behaviors.result: Drawer slides in from placement side with animation
Closes drawer
Closes drawer when closeOnInteractOutside=true
Focus returns to trigger element; slide-out animation plays

keyboard_map.action: Cycles focus through focusable elements within the drawer

accessibility.focus_management: Focus trapped inside when open; returns to trigger on close

examples.title: End Drawer (default)
examples.code:
import { Button, Drawer } from '@chakra-ui/react'

<Drawer.Root>
  <Drawer.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Open Drawer</Button>
  </Drawer.Trigger>
  <Drawer.Backdrop />
  <Drawer.Positioner>
    <Drawer.Content>
      <Drawer.Header>
        <Drawer.Title>Navigation</Drawer.Title>
      </Drawer.Header>
      <Drawer.Body>Drawer content</Drawer.Body>
      <Drawer.Footer>
        <Button variant='outline'>Close</Button>
      </Drawer.Footer>
      <Drawer.CloseTrigger />
    </Drawer.Content>
  </Drawer.Positioner>
</Drawer.Root>

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback when menu item is selected

props.name: closeOnSelect
props.description: Whether to close menu on item selection

behaviors.result: Opens menu, positions content near trigger
Fires onSelect with item value; closes menu when closeOnSelect=true
Closes menu; returns focus to trigger
Clears item highlight

keyboard_map.action: Opens menu when trigger is focused; selects highlighted item
Highlights next menu item; opens menu from trigger
Highlights first item matching typed characters

accessibility.focus_management: Focus moves to menu content on open; returns to trigger on close; arrow keys navigate items
accessibility.wcag_notes: SC 2.1.1 all functionality via keyboard; ARIA Authoring Practices menu button pattern

    <Button variant='outline'>Actions</Button>
  </Menu.Trigger>
  <Menu.Content>
    <Menu.Item value='edit'>Edit</Menu.Item>
    <Menu.Item value='duplicate'>Duplicate</Menu.Item>

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text when no value is selected

behaviors.result: Opens dropdown listbox
Updates value, closes dropdown (single select), fires onValueChange
Closes dropdown

keyboard_map.action: Opens select; moves highlight to next item
Jumps to item matching typed characters

accessibility.focus_management: Focus stays on trigger; active item tracked via aria-activedescendant
accessibility.wcag_notes: SC 4.1.2 name, role, value; ARIA combobox pattern; use Field component for label association

examples.title: Basic Select
examples.code:
import { createListCollection } from '@chakra-ui/react'
import { Select } from '@chakra-ui/react'

const frameworks = createListCollection({
  items: [
    { label: 'React', value: 'react' },
    { label: 'Vue', value: 'vue' },
    { label: 'Svelte', value: 'svelte' },
  ],
})

<Select.Root collection={frameworks}>
  <Select.Label>Framework</Select.Label>
  <Select.Control>
    <Select.Trigger>
      <Select.ValueText placeholder='Select framework' />
    </Select.Trigger>
  </Select.Control>
  <Select.Content>
    {frameworks.items.map((item) => (
      <Select.Item key={item.value} item={item}>
        <Select.ItemText>{item.label}</Select.ItemText>
      </Select.Item>
    ))}
  </Select.Content>
</Select.Root>

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled checked state; 'indeterminate' for partial selection

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the checkbox control

behaviors.result: Toggles checked state; fires onCheckedChange
Shows minus icon; clicking cycles to checked
Prevents interaction; reduces opacity

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all radio items in the group

behaviors.result: Selects item; fires onValueChange; deselects previously selected item
Navigates between radio items and selects them

keyboard_map.action: Selects next radio item in group
Selects previous radio item in group
Moves focus to/from the radio group (selected item or first)

accessibility.focus_management: Tab moves focus to the group; arrow keys move between items; selected item is focused first
accessibility.wcag_notes: SC 4.1.2 requires name for each radio; SC 1.3.1 group label required via aria-labelledby or aria-label on root

examples.title: Basic Radio Group
examples.code:
import { RadioGroup } from '@chakra-ui/react'

<RadioGroup.Root defaultValue='react' colorPalette='blue'>
  <RadioGroup.Label>Favorite Framework</RadioGroup.Label>
  {['React', 'Vue', 'Svelte'].map((item) => (
    <RadioGroup.Item key={item} value={item.toLowerCase()}>
      <RadioGroup.ItemHiddenInput />
      <RadioGroup.ItemControl>
        <RadioGroup.ItemIndicator />
      </RadioGroup.ItemControl>
      <RadioGroup.ItemText>{item}</RadioGroup.ItemText>
    </RadioGroup.Item>
  ))}
</RadioGroup.Root>

props.name: showDelay
props.description: Delay in ms before showing tooltip

props.name: hideDelay
props.description: Delay in ms before hiding tooltip

props.name: closeOnClick
props.description: Whether tooltip closes when trigger is clicked

behaviors.result: Shows tooltip after showDelay ms
Shows tooltip immediately
Hides tooltip after hideDelay ms
Hides tooltip immediately
Hides tooltip immediately

accessibility.focus_management: Tooltip itself is not focusable; appears on trigger focus/hover
accessibility.wcag_notes: SC 1.4.13 requires tooltip to persist on hover, be dismissible with Escape, and not obscure other content; role=tooltip announces via screen reader

examples.title: Basic Tooltip
examples.code:

<Tooltip.Root>

  </Tooltip.Trigger>
  <Tooltip.Positioner>
    <Tooltip.Content>
      This is a helpful tooltip
      <Tooltip.Arrow>
        <Tooltip.ArrowTip />
      </Tooltip.Arrow>
    </Tooltip.Content>
  </Tooltip.Positioner>
</Tooltip.Root>

props.name: name
props.description: User name used to generate initials fallback

props.name: borderless
props.description: Removes the border ring from the avatar

behaviors.result: Displays image, hides fallback

behaviors.trigger: src image fails to load or src not provided
behaviors.result: Shows fallback: initials from name prop or generic icon
Avatars stack with overlap; surplus count shown as +N badge

aria: alt attribute on inner img element
accessibility.focus_management: Not focusable by default; wrap in Button or Link if interactive
accessibility.wcag_notes: SC 1.1.1 non-text content; provide descriptive aria-label or alt; SC 1.4.3 contrast applies to text initials in fallback

<Avatar.Group size='sm'>

patterns.name: form-with-validation
patterns.description: A validated form pattern using Field, Input, Select, Checkbox, and Button. Wrap each input in a Field component to associate labels and error messages. Use the invalid prop to show error states. Submit with a Button in loading state during async operations.

patterns.name: data-table-with-actions
patterns.description: A data list pattern using Card as a container, Badge for status indicators, Avatar for user columns, Menu for row-level actions, and Button for bulk actions. Alert shows operation feedback above the table.

patterns.name: modal-confirmation-dialog
patterns.description: A confirmation dialog pattern using Dialog with a destructive action. The trigger is a ghost Button (or danger variant). Dialog.Body describes the irreversible action. Footer has a cancel ActionTrigger and a confirm Button with colorPalette='red'.

app_shell.recommended_structure: Wrap the application root in <Provider> from @chakra-ui/react to enable theming, color mode, and design token resolution. Use react-router-dom for client-side routing. Place route-level components inside the main content area. Use <ColorModeProvider> for dark mode toggling. Layout with Container (max-width), Grid/SimpleGrid for multi-column, Stack for vertical lists.

capabilities: dark mode via color mode context
composable compound components via namespace pattern
overlay components (Dialog, Drawer, Menu, Tooltip, Popover)
data display (Avatar, Badge, Card, Stat, Table)
theming via defineConfig and slot recipes
Ark UI headless primitives for interaction logic
gaps: data grid / data table (no built-in virtualized table)
complex date range picker (DatePicker exists but is complex to configure)

missing: specific aria attributes from Ark Field.Input
specific size dimension values in pixels
exact size pixel values per placement
exact slot recipe slot details from source
exact default showDelay/hideDelay values from source
